default_condition: same host and induction as WT
notes: Recommended hard gate at >= 0.30 x WT before claiming success
Recommended hard gate at >= 0.50 x WT

default_condition: 4 C assay or incubation before assay
normalization: variant activity at 4 C divided by WT activity at standard condition
notes: Use first for general cold-hardening claims

default_condition: three freeze-thaw cycles then standard assay
normalization: variant divided by WT after matched treatment
notes: Good proxy for handling and storage resilience

default_condition: one lyophilization and rehydration cycle then standard assay
normalization: variant divided by WT after matched treatment
notes: Highly relevant for transport and long-term storage claims

default_assay_name: residual function after low-shear microgravity proxy
default_condition: 24-72 h clinostat or rotating-wall-vessel exposure then standard assay
normalization: variant divided by WT after matched treatment
notes: Record matched aggregation or turbidity alongside function when possible

default_condition: scaffold-calibrated H2O2 challenge then standard assay
normalization: variant divided by WT after matched treatment
notes: Start with a pilot dose that stresses WT but does not flatten the assay

default_condition: scaffold-calibrated UV-C dose then standard assay
normalization: variant divided by WT after matched treatment
notes: Use when ionizing radiation access is not available

default_assay_name: residual activity after gamma or X-ray exposure
normalization: variant divided by WT after matched treatment
notes: Use mainly for radiation modules or higher-confidence Mars claims

default_condition: NaClO4 or Mg(ClO4)2 titration with matched control
normalization: variant divided by WT at the same salt condition
notes: Prefer a titration curve over a single extreme concentration
